creator: nathan@robertsonfamily.id.au
text:
Could you please mark this as a security update so that VuXML picks it up, and various monitoring tools written around "pkg audit" pick it up as a security update? (http://vuxml.freebsd.org/freebsd/index.html doesn't list it)

I don't think this bug should be marked as Closed, Fixed until it is marked as such.
